message:
bench(render): add Roaring vs Vec<bool> dirty tracking benchmark (bd-22wk8.2)

Criterion benchmarks at 4 terminal sizes (80x24, 120x40, 200x60, 400x100)
measuring construction, union, iteration, and memory for sparse (5%) and
dense (50%) dirty patterns. Vec<bool> wins on construction and union at
all sizes; Roaring's overhead only pays off for very large sparse sets.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -66,3 +66,7 @@ harness = false
 [[bench]]
 name = "arena_bench"
 harness = false
+
+[[bench]]
+name = "roaring_bench"
+harness = false
